xsl:for-each.select: /offer/products/product[description/name != '' and sizes/size/price/@gross > 0 and (@id = 73986 or @id = 85273 or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1483' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1439' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1602' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1629' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1634' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1871' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '2408' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1512' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1831' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1833' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1829' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1834' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1896' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1897' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1898' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1899' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1900' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1919' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1808' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1811' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1826' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1551' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1559' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1575' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1830' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1835' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1847' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1863' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1922' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1939' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1943' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '3021' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1513' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1547' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '3093' or iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '3849' or contains(category/@name, 'ODZIEŻ/') or contains(category/@name, 'OBUWIE/') or contains(category/@name, 'TORBY/PLECAKI') or contains(category/@name, '/KOMPASY') or contains(category/@name, '/RACJE ŻYWNOŚCIOWE') or contains(category/@name, '/SURVIVAL') or contains(category/@name, '/WYKRYWACZE METALI') or contains(category/@name, '/KUBKI I TERMOSY') or contains(category/@name, '/KARABIŃCZYKI, KLAMRY') or contains(category/@name, '/KUCHENKI TURYSTYCZNE') or contains(category/@name, '/LINKI PARACORD') or contains(category/@name, '/MENAŻKI NIEZBĘDNIKI') or contains(category/@name, '/SAPERKI') or contains(category/@name, '/ALARMY') or contains(category/@name, '/Modelarstwo')) and not(iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1441' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1443' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '2403' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1874' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1875' or iaiext:navigation/iaiext:site/iaiext:menu[1]/iaiext:item/@id = '1508' or @id = 31513 or @id = 61030)]

xsl:when.test: (../../strikethrough_retail_price and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and ../../price/@gross != price/@gross and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/iaiext:site/iaiext:price_per_size[@id = ../../../../../sizes/size/@id]/@gross > price/@gross)

translate($cleanedToken,$lowerLetters,'') != '' and string-length(translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')) > 0 and (translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='ml' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='l' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='g' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='kg' )
